raw_consumer_statement: I placed an order for over {$500.00} in merchandise from Best Buy. They sent out part of the order via their horrible service XXXX, which is not a real package delivery service. I was home at the time of delivery, but the driver said delivery could not be made. She told my {$500.00} package and for XXXX days has neither returned it to Best Buy nor has Best Buy cancelled the order as I requested multiple times. Im tired of playing this game, I just want a refund so I can take my money to XXXX who is actually competent in dealing with these matters
